text: “Person” includes a natural person, firm, copartnership, association, limited liability company, or corporation.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 1. WORDS AND PHRASES DEFINED [100 - 681]
##### § 470

“Person” includes a natural person, firm, copartnership, association, limited liability company, or corporation.

*(Amended by Stats. 1994, Ch. 1010, Sec. 225. Effective January 1, 1995.)*

subsections.text: “Person” includes a natural person, firm, copartnership, association, limited liability company, or corporation.
